proposal_summary: A proposal by Gauntlet to reactivate CRV borrowing on Aave v3 for both Ethereum and Polygon, alongside related parameter adjustments such as supplyCap, borrowCap, and debtCeiling.

disclosed_entities.name: CRV
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: CRV borrowing was disabled on Ethereum and Polygon v3

claimed_actions.raw_action: Set Ethereum v3 CRV supplyCap to 7.5m
Set Ethereum v3 CRV borrowCap to 5m
Set Ethereum v3 CRV debtCeiling to $1m
Set Ethereum v3 CRV isBorrowable to True
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Reactivate CRV borrowing on Ethereum v3
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: | Ethereum v3 | CRV | isBorrowable | False | True |

claimed_actions.raw_action: Set Polygon v3 CRV borrowCap to 300k
Set Polygon v3 CRV isBorrowable to True
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Reactivate CRV borrowing on Polygon v3
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: | Polygon v3 | CRV | isBorrowable | False | True |

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal only consists of basic risk parameter updates for an existing asset on deployed markets.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: we recommend a few other changes to CRV parameterization.

limitations: Smart contract addresses are not provided in the text.
